Name: BLADE_HOMING_AUTO_CANCEL_ENABLE_PARAM_ST
Description: Determines the homing cancellation behavior for a blade melee attack.

Fields.Name: Tracking Interrupt: Right Angle
Fields.Description: Interrupt above the specified right angle. In degrees.

Fields.Name: Tracking Interrupt: Left Angle
Fields.Description: Interrupt above the specified left angle. In degrees.

Fields.Name: Tracking Interrupt: Upward Angle
Fields.Description: Interrupt above the specified upward angle. In degrees.

Fields.Name: Tracking Interrupt: Downward Angle
Fields.Description: Interrupt above the specified downward angle. In degrees.

Fields.Name: Tracking Interrupt: Cancel Distance
Fields.Description: Interrupted within this distance. -1 = infinity = no interruption at distance. In metres.

Fields.Name: Minimum Time without Lock
Fields.Description: Minimum time without no lock. In seconds.

Fields.Name: Blade Homing Effective Distance
Fields.Description: When the target is outside this distance, the behavior is non-locking. -1 always behaves when locked
